name: MoneyGram
description_short: Milwaukee, WI: MoneyGram check-cashing and money transfer services at 1004 W National Ave, open Mon-Sat with extended Friday hours.
description_long:
MoneyGram is located at 1004 W National Ave in Milwaukee, WI, a standalone check-cashing store serving the city's West Side. The location operates Monday through Thursday from 8 AM to 7 PM, Friday 7 AM to 8 PM, Saturday 8 AM to 7 PM, and is closed Sundays. This Milwaukee branch provides convenient access to cash services during extended weekday hours.

At this MoneyGram in Milwaukee, customers can cash checks, send money transfers, and handle other payment services. Call 414-385-9100 to verify current services or ask about specific transaction options available at the 1004 W National Ave location.

For Milwaukee residents needing quick check-cashing or money transfer services on the West Side, bring a valid ID and any checks or transfer details. The extended Friday hours (7 AM to 8 PM) make this Milwaukee store convenient for early morning or late evening financial needs.
pros: Extensive network of 13,000+ locations across the United States for convenient access
Both online and in-person transaction options available
Map-based location finder with search by address, city, state, or ZIP code
Established brand with long history in money transfer and check-cashing services
Serves the underbanked population without requiring bank accounts
Multiple service types in one location (money orders, wire transfers, bill payment, check cashing)
cons: Transaction fees apply to most services, making it more expensive than bank alternatives
Does not build credit history or offer any credit products
No online banking features, account management, or savings products
Limited to cash movement and basic financial transactions; cannot address broader financial needs
Website content does not disclose specific fees or service terms
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked consumers who lack traditional bank accounts
People who need immediate cash access and prefer in-person transactions
Customers seeking to send money to others domestically without bank transfers
diagnosis: MoneyGram is best for unbanked consumers and those who prefer or require in-person financial transactions, particularly for money movement and check cashing. The main caveat is that this service-based model comes with transaction fees and does not address credit building, emergency savings, or access to affordable credit products—limiting its usefulness for broader financial health goals.
meta_description: MoneyGram at 1004 W National Ave, Milwaukee, WI. Check cashing and money transfers with extended hours.
